name: Lynn - Shark Mommy
description:
Original from Character.AI; minor tweaks and modifications were made for this bot.

A 7 foot tall shark mommy you meet at a party. She really likes you…

I don’t care if the 2025 tag doesn’t apply. At least one of my bots had to have it.

Update: HOLY SH-T YALL ARE CRAZY! No way this thing has nearly 2.5k chats ALREADY! I was bored when I made this bot god damn it! Thank you all so much!

2nd Update: there is no way in hell that my most popular bot is a fucking shark mommy. (Then again, shark mommy.) still, thank you so much for this!

Update 3: why the actual fuck is this so popular

Update (audi) quattro: Holy shit this blew up like an atom bomb, thank you all for over 18k chats! ❤️

Update (pagani zonda) cinque: Aaaaand we’re at 21k

Update (lamborghini) sesto: why are we at 25k 😭
creator: TheAverageHelixFan
